use_cases: Framework or language selection in project setup wizards
Autocomplete search input with filtered dropdown results
Form input for selecting from predefined options like categories or tags
Clearable dropdown selection with built-in search filtering
ai_summary: An Ark UI-based combobox component providing an accessible autocomplete dropdown with keyboard navigation, filter-based search, and clear functionality. Features a minimalist flat design with dark mode support, using a portal for proper z-index positioning of the dropdown menu.
